_description: Sample intermediate chunks output for debugging the RAG pipeline. This file demonstrates the structure of processed document chunks stored in Qdrant.

chunks.text: Backend service is implemented with FastAPI framework, providing RESTful API endpoints for document upload, processing, and chat functionality.
chunks.parent_text: Chapter 2: System Architecture. Backend service is implemented with FastAPI framework, providing RESTful API endpoints for document upload, processing, and chat functionality. The service handles authentication via JWT tokens.

chunks.text: Qdrant is used as the vector database for storing document embeddings. Each document gets its own collection with cosine similarity metric.
chunks.parent_text: Chapter 2: System Architecture. Qdrant is used as the vector database for storing document embeddings. Each document gets its own collection with cosine similarity metric. The embedding dimension is 768 from nomic-embed-text model.

chunks.text: The CRAG (Corrective RAG) loop implements a self-reflective retrieval mechanism with confidence thresholds, query reformulation, and parallel re-retrieval.
chunks.parent_text: Chapter 3: RAG Pipeline. The CRAG (Corrective RAG) loop implements a self-reflective retrieval mechanism with confidence thresholds, query reformulation, and parallel re-retrieval. When initial retrieval confidence is below 0.45, the system activates agentic workflow.
